events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess structural framing commercial project, missing jack studs, tested/inspected. Need compare against IRC R502, R602. Need decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Missing jack studs compromise load path around openings, non-compliant. Risk high or critical? Structural framing missing jack studs can cause header support failure, but maybe high. Work stage tested/inspected. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 90? value 0. confidence 0.95. findings: missing jack studs at openings, header not adequately supported. actions: install jack studs per plans/code, re-inspect. rationale: jack studs required to transfer loads from header to bottom plate/cripple studs; absence violates IRC R602 and creates structural failure risk. references: IRC R602.7? Actually R602.7 headers, R602.7.1? Jack studs. R502 maybe floor framing. Need include IRC R502, R602. Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside.

  "rationale": "Jack studs are required to carry header reactions to the bottom plate and distribute loads around wall openings. Their absence creates a structural defect and a load-path failure risk, making the framing non-compliant with IRC R602 and the approved documents.",
